summary: R2 systems re-review accepted. The requested changes were addressed: repeated same-victor same-district postwar arrangements are rejected regardless of settlementId, direct-after-vassal/tribute is coherently rejected instead of partially replacing rights, and restore-vassal-ruler now rejects missing ruler or policy inputs before creating obligations. Regression tests cover the R1 failures, and required validation passed.

tests_run.result: On feat/m3-postwar-governance; changed/untracked files are task-scoped.
No initialized project ops wrapper marker found; ran lead-requested pnpm/taskctl commands directly.
Task JSON parsed; required keys present; status REVIEW and route_to systems_architect.
No forbidden random/time, framework/fs, or M4/full-scope drift matches in reviewed implementation/test files.
All 13 changed or untracked paths are within allowed_paths and none match forbidden_paths.
Different-settlement same-district arrangement, direct-after-vassal, and null-ruler restore are now rejected; rejected commands leave stateHash unchanged.
14 files passed; 94 tests passed. Existing Node MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning observed.
Node/worker hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root Vitest 24 files/154 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file/3 tests passed.
Workspace typecheck passed for packages with typecheck scripts.
ESLint completed with no reported errors.
Prettier format check passed for all matched files.

decisions.reason: R2 repairs close the prior authority/obligation overlap findings without expanding product scope.
Rejecting replacement avoids introducing treaty/right-retirement semantics before M4 while preserving one-controller and no-overlapping-obligations invariants.
The method now matches its name and cannot create obligations without a restored or retained local ruler enfeoffment.

decisions.decision: No packages/save-format changes found; existing M3 save rejection remains acceptable until M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001.

risks.issue: R2 intentionally does not implement replacement or clearing of postwar arrangements. If design later needs replacement, it should be a separate architecture decision with explicit obligation retirement and rights-transfer events.
Projection coefficients remain M3 prototype constants and should be tuned by balance work, not treated as final economy or military balance.

requested_action: Proceed with lead orchestration. Systems architecture review accepts M3-POSTWAR-GOVERNANCE-001 R2.
